redesign_trigger: DG-09 reject — budget misaligned (contractor $380K vs client budget $200K, variance 90%)
redesign_scope: Remove pool entirely. Reduce living area from 216 sqm to 160 sqm. Retain 3-bedroom program but reduce room sizes and eliminate pool bathroom. Retain covered patio as dry terrace only.

spaces.name: Bathroom 2
spaces.notes: Reduced from 8 sqm. Pool bath eliminated.

spaces.name: Dining / Living
spaces.notes: Reduced from 40 sqm — pool removed, view terrace added

spaces.name: Patio / Terrace (dry)
spaces.notes: Reduced from 30 sqm. Dry terrace — no pool.

deviations.justification: Scope reduction per DG-09 reject — budget misalignment required 56 sqm reduction and pool removal to align with $200K client budget

area_program_compliance.notes: Redesigned program at 160 sqm — all 3 bedrooms retained. Pool eliminated per Marcela instruction. Area reductions distributed proportionally across all spaces.

structural_coordination_notes: Pool shell and associated structural design removed from scope. Simplified foundation: slab on grade without pool structural elements. Coastal wind zone design retained. Engineering package requires update to remove pool systems.
